title: containers-common bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4:1-135.0.1]
- Disable zstd:chunked partial pull support
- Updated removed references [Orabug: 33473101] (Alex Burmashev)
- Adjust registries.conf (Nikita Gerasimov)
- remove references to RedHat registry (Nikita Gerasimov)

[4:1-135]
- Update rhel-shortnames-overrides to include complete list of UBI/RHEL images
- Resolves: RHEL-116618
full_text:
[4:1-135.0.1]
- Disable zstd:chunked partial pull support
- Updated removed references [Orabug: 33473101] (Alex Burmashev)
- Adjust registries.conf (Nikita Gerasimov)
- remove references to RedHat registry (Nikita Gerasimov)

[4:1-135]
- Update rhel-shortnames-overrides to include complete list of UBI/RHEL images
- Resolves: RHEL-116618

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20921.html
